race.comment: OUR SASSY LADY (8) went to a new level here last start when dictating from the front and never giving her rivals a sniff. Daresay they will be looking to double down on the aggressive tactics and try to run them into the ground again. KING OF WESSEX (7) is tricky to catch but has peaks littered through his form that can measure up. Draws to get the suck run with Holder aboard first time. LONGER ROUTE (3) stuck on soundly into a midfield finish when resuming last time. Rises to a winning trip second-up and goes his best on the main track. A wide alley the only concern. FLASH ALICE (6) drove hard to arrive just in time and get the verdict at Murray Bridge. Drawn kinder this time and if she holds her form she'll go very close to repeating the dose. EM SIXTY (1) has been much better in his last two and looks better suited out this trip.
